landing.heroTitle: Learn AI in your own language.
landing.heroSubtitle: VASHA is where Albanian women learn artificial intelligence and use it for real life — CVs, interviews, business, children, English. All in Albanian, with warmth.
landing.heroNote: No technical knowledge. No fear. Just you and a wise helper.
landing.trustLine: Join women from Albania, Kosovo and the diaspora.
landing.f1Body: Pick a real-life goal and get a clear answer in Albanian. Never a blank box.
landing.f2Body: Dozens of ready-to-use ideas — copy, adapt, and run them in one click.
landing.f3Body: Short lessons that take you from 'what is AI' to 'I just made my CV'.
landing.f4Body: Circles of women like you: mothers, job-seekers, entrepreneurs. Ask, share, grow.
landing.f5Body: One small step every day. Keep the rhythm and build confidence.
landing.f6Body: Your text isn't stored. Keys stay on the server. You are safe.
landing.how1Body: CV, interview, weekly plan… choose what you need today.
landing.how2Body: No blank page. We guide you with simple questions.
landing.how3Body: Clear, in Albanian, ready to use. Copy it and go.
landing.finalSubtitle: Join the women making AI their everyday friend.

sandbox.title: AI Practice
sandbox.subtitle: Choose what you need today. We guide you step by step — no blank page.
sandbox.resultHint: Read it, edit it to fit you, and copy it. It's yours.
sandbox.emptyBody: Fill in the fields on the left and press “Help me”. You'll see the answer written word by word.
sandbox.demoNotice: You're seeing demo mode — this is a sample answer. Add a Gemini key for real AI replies.
sandbox.limitReached: You've used your {limit} free tries today. Come back tomorrow or go Premium for unlimited tries.
sandbox.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
sandbox.languageHint: Answers come in Albanian. Switch language at the top right for English.

footer.madeWith: Made with dedication for Albanian women.

privacy.title: Your privacy, made simple
privacy.intro: Your trust means everything to us. Here's how we handle your data, in plain words:
privacy.p1: The text you write — your CV, messages, stories — is not stored. It's used only to give you an answer, then forgotten.
privacy.p2: AI requests pass through our server to Google Gemini. Our keys always stay on the server, never in your browser.
privacy.p3: We keep only the minimum: your account and what you choose to save yourself (answers, progress).
privacy.p4: You can ask us to delete your data at any time.
